description: Unified 5-seed main-comparison folder. PPO uses the fixed PPO rerun; other methods merge legacy seed1-3 seed_sweep records with seed4-5 main-comparison records.
notes: Legacy seed1-3 CSVs did not retain derived config paths; config is marked legacy_seed_sweep in normalized records.
For legacy records without best_distance, best_distance is set to final_distance for numeric completeness.
For legacy successful_path_stretch, successful episodes use the legacy path_efficiency value; failed episodes are NaN.
